# headerLabel

**Instance Property**

The SwiftUI view displayed by the template.

## Declaration

```swift
@_NilHidden<Label> final var headerLabel: Label { get set }
```

## Accessing the Content

- **headerTextProvider**: The header text to display in the complication.
- **bodyTextProvider**: The main body text to display in the complication.
- **gaugeProvider**: The gauge to display in the complication.
